_meta.name: aux_flux_reweight
_meta.description: FluxAndReweightFiles tarball — the ONE exception to the streaming-only policy (a .tgz cannot be streamed). Consumed at the weights stage.
_meta.status: fetched 2026-06-12 (size verified vs remote stat); unpack deferred to the weights stage

layout.MATFluxAndReweightFiles/: equivalent of $PLOTUTILSROOT/data (flux/, flux_daisy/, hadronReweight/, mhrwKineRenorm/, dataMCWiggle/, lowNuReweight/, neutronInelasticReweight/)

notes: me1A-1F all map to the minervame1D flux files (FluxReweighter::playlistString).
Reweighted flux hist: flux_E_cvweighted; generated flux hist: flux_E_unweighted.
nu-e constraint is applied at load time from the constraint txt; see docs/open_questions.md.
